senses.definition: an activity that we enjoy doing in our free time

examples.x: Can you guess what his favorite hobby is?
I like reading books as a hobby, especially mystery novels.
My hobby is painting, and I enjoy creating colorful artwork.
She spends her free time gardening as a hobby.
They enjoy hiking and exploring nature as a hobby.

senses.definition: a story told through a series of moving pictures with sound, usually watched via television or in a cinema

examples.x: He watched a scary movie and got scared during the suspenseful scenes.
I watched a comedy movie and couldn't stop laughing.
She downloaded a new movie to watch on her laptop during the flight.
We bought popcorn and soda to enjoy during the movie.
We discussed our favorite movie scenes with our friends after watching a film.

senses.definition: a series of sounds made by instruments or voices, arranged in a way that is pleasant to listen to

examples.x: He plays the piano and enjoys composing beautiful music.
I listen to music to relax and unwind after a long day.
My husband's favorite genre of music is pop.
The soothing music helped everyone relax after a long day.
Her favorite genre of music is jazz.

senses.definition: a musical instrument, usually with six strings, that we play by pulling the strings with our fingers or with a plectrum

examples.x: He is practicing fingerpicking techniques on the guitar.
They formed a band, and he plays the guitar.
They play the guitar together during jam sessions.
We gathered around the campfire, singing songs accompanied by the guitar.

senses.definition: a musical instrument we play by pressing the black and white keys on the keyboard

examples.x: I learned how to read sheet music to play the piano.
I love playing the piano and composing my own melodies.
She played a soft lullaby on the piano to put the baby to sleep.
She practices the piano every day to improve her skills.
We attended a piano recital and were impressed by the young pianist's talent.

senses.definition: a musical instrument that we play by holding it under our chin and moving a bow across its strings

examples.x: He carries his violin case everywhere he goes.
She plays the violin with grace and precision.
They hired a violin teacher to guide them in their learning.
We gathered around as she performed a heartfelt solo on her violin.

senses.definition: the act of moving our bodies through water with the use of our arms and legs, particularly as a sport

examples.x: He learned how to do the front crawl stroke in swimming lessons.
Swimming helps to improve our cardiovascular fitness.
They joined a swimming club to meet other swimmers and train together.

senses.definition: a type of sport where two teams, with eleven players each, try to kick a ball into a specific area to win points

examples.x: I like to watch soccer matches on TV and support my favorite team.
She joined a soccer league to compete against other teams.
They practice their soccer skills every day after school.
We cheer loudly for our favorite soccer team during the match.

senses.definition: a type of sport in which two teams of 6 players try to hit a ball over a net and into the other team's side

examples.x: She enjoys the teamwork and strategy involved in playing volleyball.
She joined a local volleyball league to compete against other teams.
Volleyball is an exciting sport where teams try to score points by hitting the ball over the net.
We are learning the rules of volleyball to participate in a friendly game.
We cheer loudly for our school's volleyball team during their matches.

senses.definition: the activity of taking long walks in the countryside or mountains, often for fun

examples.x: Hiking is a great way to explore nature and enjoy the fresh air.
She enjoys exploring nature and getting exercise through hiking.
She joined a hiking group to meet like-minded individuals and discover new trails.

senses.definition: a sport in which two or four players use rackets to hit a small ball backward and forward over a net

examples.x: She won the tennis tournament and received a trophy.
They play tennis as a way to stay active and fit.

senses.definition: a vehicle with two wheels that we ride by pushing its pedals with our feet

examples.x: He enjoys going on long bicycle rides in the countryside.
He wears a helmet for safety when riding his bicycle.
I love the feeling of the wind in my hair when I ride my bicycle.
I want someone to teach me how to ride a bicycle.
They are buying a new bicycle for their daughter's birthday.

senses.definition: a physical activity or competitive game with specific rules that people do for fun or as a profession

examples.x: Basketball is a dynamic sport that demands quick thinking and agility.
Boxing is a competitive sport demanding strength, speed, and resilience.
Football is a popular sport that is played with a round ball and two teams.
Hockey is an exciting sport played on ice or field, with sticks and a small puck or ball.

senses.definition: a playful activity in which we use our imagination, play with toys, etc.

examples.x: During the camping trip, we played a game of charades around the campfire.
Hide and seek is a game where one person closes their eyes and counts while others hide, and then the seeker tries to find them.
My favorite game to play with my family is Pictionary.

senses.definition: a digital game that we play on a computer, game console, or mobile device

examples.x: I enjoy playing video games with my friends online.
I like to challenge myself by playing different levels in video games.
I'm excited to try out a new video game that was just released.
My brother spends hours playing video games on his console.
My favorite video game is a racing game where I can drive fast cars.

senses.definition: a set of large folded sheets of paper with lots of stories, pictures, and information printed on them about things like sport, politic, etc., usually issued daily or weekly

examples.x: I enjoy doing the crossword puzzle in the newspaper to challenge my brain.
I like to read the newspaper with a cup of coffee to start my day.
I use the newspaper as a source for my research papers because it has reliable information.
The newspaper has a column where readers can write in and ask for advice.
The newspaper has an entertainment section with movie reviews and celebrity news.

senses.definition: a colorful thin book that has news, pictures, and stories about different things like fashion, sports, and animals, usually issued weekly or monthly

examples.x: I often read parenting magazines to get advice on raising my children.
I subscribe to a science magazine that keeps me updated on scientific discoveries.
My mom subscribes to a cooking magazine, and we often try new recipes from it.
The magazine features interviews with musicians and reviews of new albums.
The library has a wide selection of magazines on different subjects.
